testcases.title: Load the page cold.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin
assertions: Breadcrumb and back navigation, help text, Organization and Personal counts, search, Bulk add secrets, Add secret, table, and empty or list state render without page or console errors.

testcases.title: Inspect both scopes.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin
assertions: Organization and Personal tabs show independent counts; Name, Type, Note, Updated by, and Updated at columns are readable without displaying secret values.

testcases.title: Inspect the empty state.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin
assertions: No secrets found and Add your first secret appear; controls remain usable and no row from the other scope leaks into the view.

testcases.title: Open the dialog without submitting.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin
assertions: Scope, type, name, value, note, Redact value, close, and Store secret controls appear; the title reflects the selected scope.

steps: Return to the starting page and reset to a clean state

testcases.title: Inspect Raw secret, Cookie, TOTP, and bulk-import forms.
testcases.navigation: Secrets → Add secret / Bulk add secrets
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: Inspect Raw secret, Cookie, TOTP, and bulk-import forms.

assertions: Raw, Cookie JSON or base64, TOTP and QR, upload-file, pasted `.env`, scope, and gated Store controls match the selected workflow.

testcases.title: Search each scope using full or partial name, no-match, whitespace, case variants, Unicode, long, HTML-like, and injection-like input; clear it.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: Search each scope using full or partial name, no-match, whitespace, case variants, Unicode, long, HTML-like, and injection-like input; clear it.

assertions: Filtering is literal and safe; no-match is clear; clearing restores only the active scope's rows.

testcases.title: Test blank, whitespace, punctuation, leading-digit, very long, Unicode, HTML-like, and duplicate names.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: Test blank, whitespace, punctuation, leading-digit, very long, Unicode, HTML-like, and duplicate names.

assertions: Required validation is clear; unsafe text remains inert; documented environment-variable normalization and duplicate suffixing are deterministic and collision-safe.

testcases.title: With approval, create disposable Raw secrets with blank, whitespace, multiline, Unicode, very long, and special-character values plus long or HTML-like notes.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: With approval, create disposable Raw secrets with blank, whitespace, multiline, Unicode, very long, and special-character values plus long or HTML-like notes.

assertions: Required value validation is actionable; supported values persist exactly; notes render inertly; plaintext is never exposed after saving.

testcases.title: Test valid JSON or base64 and malformed JSON, invalid base64, missing fields, unsupported domains or paths, duplicates, and oversized payloads.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: Test valid JSON or base64 and malformed JSON, invalid base64, missing fields, unsupported domains or paths, duplicates, and oversized payloads.

assertions: Only valid Chromium-format cookies are accepted; errors identify the problem without logging cookie contents.

testcases.title: Test valid disposable `otpauth://` data, malformed URI or base32, missing issuer, account, or secret, oversized input, and denied QR-camera access.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: Test valid disposable `otpauth://` data, malformed URI or base32, missing issuer, account, or secret, oversized input, and denied QR-camera access.

assertions: Valid dedicated-account TOTP data is accepted; invalid data and scanner failures are handled safely without exposing the seed.

executors.blockedReason: Requires human judgment or a different user role to execute safely

testcases.title: Paste or upload `.env` data containing comments, blank lines, quoted or multiline values, `=` inside values, duplicate keys, invalid lines, Unicode, and mixed-validity rows.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: Paste or upload `.env` data containing comments, blank lines, quoted or multiline values, `=` inside values, duplicate keys, invalid lines, Unicode, and mixed-validity rows.

assertions: Parsing is consistent between paste and file upload; preview or errors identify affected keys without exposing values; no partial import occurs unless explicitly confirmed.

executors.blockedReason: Requires human judgment or a different user role to execute safely

testcases.title: Switch Organization and Personal scopes and secret types after entering unsaved data; close, press Escape, go Back, refresh, and revisit.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: Switch Organization and Personal scopes and secret types after entering unsaved data; close, press Escape, go Back, refresh, and revisit.

assertions: Scope, title, and fields remain consistent; warning or documented discard behavior occurs; no secret is silently stored or moved between scopes.

testcases.title: With approval, create a disposable secret → verify metadata → edit name, value, note, and redaction → reload → delete it.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: With approval, create a disposable secret → verify metadata → edit name, value, note, and redaction → reload → delete it.

assertions: CRUD persists correctly; editing never reveals the previous value unnecessarily; only the selected secret changes; cleanup removes it.

testcases.title: With approval, cancel once, then confirm; repeat with similarly named rows.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: With approval, cancel once, then confirm; repeat with similarly named rows.

assertions: Confirmation identifies the exact secret and scope; cancel changes nothing; confirm removes only the selected secret and leaves no usable residual value.

testcases.title: With approval, create disposable Personal and Organization secrets, then inspect as creator, another member, admin, and non-member.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: With approval, create disposable Personal and Organization secrets, then inspect as creator, another member, admin, and non-member.

assertions: Personal secrets are visible and usable only in the creator's sessions; Organization secrets are usable by organization members, while view and edit privileges follow documented admin rules.

executors.blockedReason: Requires human judgment or a different user role to execute safely

testcases.title: With approval, add, update, and delete a disposable secret while old and new sessions exist.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: With approval, add, update, and delete a disposable secret while old and new sessions exist.

assertions: Changes follow documented session timing: new secrets become available to newly created sessions, and stale sessions do not gain unexpected access.

executors.blockedReason: Requires human judgment or a different user role to execute safely

testcases.title: With approval, enable redaction, use a disposable marker in a new session, and inspect the UI, DOM, console, requests, transcript, logs, and errors.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: With approval, enable redaction, use a disposable marker in a new session, and inspect the UI, DOM, console, requests, transcript, logs, and errors.

assertions: The value remains usable where intended but is masked from user-visible and diagnostic surfaces; copying, editing, and failures do not reveal it.

executors.blockedReason: Requires human judgment or a different user role to execute safely

testcases.title: As a non-admin or with tampered organization or secret IDs, attempt list, create, view, edit, delete, bulk import, and scope-changing requests.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: As a non-admin or with tampered organization or secret IDs, attempt list, create, view, edit, delete, bulk import, and scope-changing requests.

assertions: Server-side authorization prevents IDOR, privilege escalation, cross-organization access, and access to another user's Personal secrets.

executors.blockedReason: Requires human judgment or a different user role to execute safely

testcases.title: With approval, create unique disposable Personal and Organization Raw secrets → start new creator and member sessions that reference `$SECRET_NAME` → verify scope and value use without printing sensitive data → edit and retest in new sessions → delete both.
preconditions: User is authenticated as an enterprise admin

steps.action: With approval, create unique disposable Personal and Organization Raw secrets → start new creator and member sessions that reference `$SECRET_NAME` → verify scope and value use without printing sensitive data → edit and retest in new sessions → delete both.

assertions: Correct secrets are injected only into allowed new sessions; Personal and Organization isolation and updates work; cleanup confirms later sessions cannot access either disposable secret.

executors.blockedReason: Requires human judgment or a different user role to execute safely
